ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paolini-Mori for and with Mike Novac (Personal Representative). Emanuel Kallina and Ellen Hennessey (by Court Call) for Kallina & Associates.

Ms. Paolini-Mori stated that the fees were for two years of work which was productive in closing the estate, that other counsel in the matter commended her for her work, and that there were no objections to her fees by any of the heirs. Mr. Kallina stated that somethings were done twice with regard to the handling of the federal taxes. The Court stated that there may be a small reduction in the fees, and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico.
